tasks.title: Fix content script injection for Instagram DM detection
tasks.description: Make InstagramStrangerMonitor content script actually inject into Instagram DM pages and detect conversations in real-time

validation.command: npm run build && echo 'Content script built successfully'

checkpoints.description: Fixed build error in form-monitor.ts by making event listener callback async

tasks.title: Create real Instagram DM test environment
tasks.description: Set up actual Instagram DM page or realistic simulator that the extension can monitor and detect

tasks.title: Implement real-time DOM observation for Instagram
tasks.description: Make the extension actually observe Instagram DOM changes and detect new messages as they appear

tasks.title: Test stranger alert popup in browser
tasks.description: Verify that StrangerAlert component actually renders and displays in browser when stranger is detected

validation.command: npm run build && echo 'Extension builds with StrangerAlert component'

tasks.title: Connect ML model to real Instagram data extraction
tasks.description: Make the ML model extract actual features from Instagram DOM (profile info, mutual friends, message content) instead of mock data

tasks.title: Create comprehensive testing scenario with real conversations
tasks.description: Build end-to-end test with realistic conversation patterns that demonstrate detection on actual Instagram-like interface

validation.command: npm run build && test -f test-instagram-dm.html && echo 'Test environment ready'
